title: CEO Commentary on Shares & Deposits: As of December 31, 2026
content:
Total member shares increased by $845,472 as of December 31, 2026, representing a 1.2% gain year-over-year. This growth reflects the continued strength in core share categories that form the foundation of our funding base.

Share Drafts remain the largest funding component at 29.9% of total shares, totaling $253,055 ($845,472), while Share Certificates account for $254,828 (30.1%), continuing to represent a meaningful portion of our portfolio. Regular Shares totaled $208,686 (24.7%) of the funding mix, while Money Market Shares represented $104,458 (12.4%). Smaller balances within other share categories remain limited.

Most core deposit categories grew from the previous period, particularly Share Drafts (3.9%), Regular Shares (3.2%), and All Other Shares (6.9%).
